prompt: Take a look at our test coverage for this .NET solution and tell me where I should be adding tests next. I've got maybe a day of testing work I can budget this sprint and want to know what to spend it on.

assertions.text: Report names at least 3 specific files (e.g. Controllers/*.cs or specific service classes), not just layer-level guidance
Report includes a numeric overall coverage percentage
Report includes a per-layer or per-project coverage breakdown
Top recommendations cite a concrete signal (churn, complexity, untested public API, or coverage %) — not generic 'add more tests'
Report closes with a clear next step (e.g. offer to draft tests for a specific file)
Report does not write any output files (no coverage-report.md created in the repo)
